name: Bitterne North

locations.name: Portswood
locations.address:
Portswood Police Station
11 St Denys Road
Portswood
Southampton

description:
The Bitterne North neighbourhood comprises the areas of Harefield, Bitterne Park and Townhill Park. It covers mainly residential areas and includes several long established housing estates. The area is served by 2 secondary schools, Bitterne Park School and Sixth Form, which is the largest in Southampton and Woodlands Community College. There are also 2 independent schools which offer secondary level provision, The Gregg School and St Marys College.
Local policing is provided by a dedicated team of 1 sergeant, 6 constables and 3 PCSO’s.
Our team is focussed on protecting the most vulnerable in society, and working to reduce crime and anti social behaviour
This site will give you a brief overview of our current priorities, and when the next public meetings are, as well as what we are doing to tackle offending in your area. If you wish to contact us, please feel free to call on 101.
